title: I am a beginner getting some crazy high confidence signals
author: ScaredSecretary5229
selftext:
I started on a newsletter from my friend and I have to say that it's been pretty smooth sailing. I'm playing very small numbers right now cuz I'm not a volume trader by any means, I'm just in my mid20s looking to learn and invest my money instead of let it sit.   
  
I definitely learned my lesson about volatile stocks that move a lot because I set a stop loss a bit too close to my buy in price and it exited me early. And ofc, a day later it bounced back to my profit taker lol. 

It's been great tho, and the signals come with confidence which is helpful in calming the nerves. I'd recommend, i'm paying 20 for 5 per month but I've bought extra signals. I'm asking them to raise the amount per month and to spread them out more instead of sending all at once. I typically only play on anything over 80%, they only release signals with 75%. 

  
Another tip is when you first buy in is don't put a stop loss, just wait. I have been waiting until I see clear movement upward then set my stop loss.

replies.author: ScaredSecretary5229
replies.body: yeah - I used it every week

replies.author: Rajesh7536
replies.body: Do they have forex too? I couldn’t find any in their site

replies.author: ScaredSecretary5229
replies.body: No they only do individual stock signals
